role: Bringing order, love, and the foundation of divinity to life
treePosition: As presented in the workbook, following Tehuti — see Sekher's provenance note on how this ordering was inferred.
teachingNotes: Bringing Order to our Lives resulting in Health, Wealth and Success.
Awakening the power of Selfless Love that brings the greatest Blessings to life.
Laying the unshakable foundation of Divinity and most important relationship in Life — your relationship with God.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being endowed with the ability to bring harmony to my life, my family, my community and the world.
Wealth, not attained divinely, does not enrichen the soul.
Peace and love are the paths to health, wealth, and success.
Thank you, God for making me in your image, and likeness. Peaceful by nature, with no need for deeds of closure, as suffering can never touch me.
My peace in the face of the wrongdoer is the image of God.
Thank you God for the opportunity to learn that you need me as I need you. I delay not the work to become your living temple on earth.

Why should I not bless strangers and transgressors? Have I not received unasked-for blessings? Did I earn all of the good things that came my way? God has given to me through others and asked for nothing in return. I give thanks for God's love for me by showering others with my love.
